eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Florida; at 8:58 PM on MAR 27, 2019 Effective until 10:58 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A FLORIDA AMBER ALERT HAS BEEN ISSUED FOR SOPHIA DIAZ A WHITE FEMALE 15 YEARS OLD 5 FEET 7 INCHES TALL 155 POUNDS BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES LAST SEEN IN THE AREA OF THE 2800 BLOCK OF COLLEGE VIEW DRIVE IN MELBOURNE FLORIDA. SOPHIA WEARS BRACES AND HAS A TATTOO ON HER LEFT SHOULDER DEPICTING A ROSE. THE CHILD MAY BE IN THE COMPANY OF KARIS DIAZ A WHITE FEMALE 37 YEARS OLD 5 FEET 5 INCHES TALL BROWN HAIR AND BLUE EYES AND CURTIS CLEMONS A WHITE MALE 33 YEARS OLD 6 FEET 3 INCHES TALL 200 POUNDS BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES. CURTIS POSSIBLY HAS A BEARD. THEY MAY BE TRAVELING IN A  WHITE FORD F550 FLORIDA TAG NUMBER IBIV68. THIS IS A RECREATIONAL VEHICLE.  IF LOCATED DO NOT APPROACH. CONTACT LAW ENFORCEMENT IMMEDIATELY. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child please contact the Palm Bay Police Department at 321-952-3456 or 911. FLAMBER.
